text: The implementation of shortest_paths is incorrect. It tries to update edge weights instead of node weights during relaxation, causing no updates to weight_by_node, so results remain infinite except the source. Tests fail because the output distances do not match expected shortest path distances.

data.label: The shortest_paths function incorrectly updates edge weights instead of node distances.
This incorrect update leads to all nodes except the source having infinite distance in the output.
Test cases fail because output does not match expected shortest path distances.
